mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_relation_group(group_id, user_id, group_name, is_deleted) VALUES(#{groupId}, #{userId}, #{groupName}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_relation_group SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT group_id, user_id, group_name, is_deleted, create_time FROM user_relation_group WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
